message:
Dear Hiring Team,
I would like to inquire if you currently have any vacancies for the role of Hotel Receptionist or general Front Desk staff.
I have a strong background in customer service, excellent communication skills, and a genuine passion for providing guests, I will be glad to be considered for an interview and I am ready to send my CV for your review.
Thank you for your time, consideration, and feedback.
Want to make inquiries about the poolside
